purpose: Verify BrowserLeaks Fonts no longer crashes the packaged macOS arm64 BrowseForge Chromium runtime after sanitizing the invalid Hiragino Sans W0 CSS family.

source_changes: third_party/blink/renderer/core/css/css_font_family_value.cc sanitizes Hiragino Sans W0 to sans-serif before CSS font-family value caching
third_party/blink/renderer/core/css/css_font_selector.cc avoids CSSSegmentedFontFace lookup for the invalid synthetic family when the fingerprint font list switch is active
third_party/blink/renderer/core/css/font_face_set.cc keeps the explicit fingerprint-fonts-list allowlist behavior for document.fonts.check()

smoke_results.title: Check browser fingerprinting with Pixelscan 🔎Analyze your digital trail

remaining_blockers: This is a headed macOS arm64 smoke matrix, not a full detector-grade recertification across all surfaces and platforms.
Linux arm64 detector and Playwright Bind parity gates remain governed by existing release blockers.
